channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Physicists create a new quantum state: fractional Fermi sea
item.description: Researchers have shown that ultracold atoms can be driven into a strange new quantum state called a fractional Fermi sea, where particles organize in unusual ways.

item.title: Omega-3 fish oil shows no brain benefit in study
item.description: Fish oil supplements delivered omega-3s to the brain, but a two-year study found no meaningful benefits for memory, cognition, or Alzheimer's prevention.

item.title: Brain activity under anesthesia raises new questions about consciousness
item.description: The unconscious brain may be more active than previously thought. Patients under general anesthesia were found to still process complex information.

item.title: Tiny soil microbes could help crops thrive in salty farmland
item.description: Researchers found that beneficial soil bacteria help plants survive in salty soils. Instead of aiding water retention, the microbes trigger a different survival mechanism.
